title: coryphopteris squamipes
intro: Coryphopteris squamipes, also known as the Rough-leaf Coryphopteris, is a type of fern native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Coryphopteris squamipes typically involve infusions, decoctions, or powders made from the leaves, which can be administered orally or applied topically.
